title: Lesson 243: (Grammar) - don't; do; hey; listen; you; now, ...; well, ...; ...

intro_cards.title: Sentence Ender な: Exclamation / Prohibition
intro_cards.body:
な as a sentence-final particle has several uses:

1. Exclamation / strong feeling:
• いい天気だな。(Great weather!)
• うまいな！(That's tasty!)

2. Prohibitive command (blunt — use with care):
• 行くな！(Don't go!)
• 見るな！(Don't look!)

3. Thinking aloud / soft wondering:
• そろそろ行くかな。(I guess I'll head out.)

⚠ な (prohibitive) sounds harsh. It appears in manga/anime but
would be rude to say to teachers or adults. Use ないでください instead.
